Name: 1991 Happy Holidays Barbie Doll
Description: Barbie® is elegance personified in this full-length green velvety gown with a beaded bodice of red, green and white sequins and beads. A matching bow tops Barbie® doll's flowing hair. Accessories are red and silvery, nicely complimenting the rest of her merry costume.

Name: 1992 Happy Holidays Barbie Doll
Description: Barbie® is ready for the holiday season, dressed in a luxurious, silver lamé gown. The many layers of her tulle skirt are accented with holographic glitter, and shimmering beads dangle from the bodice. Silvery earrings and a silvery "jewel"-accented hairband create the finishing touches to this festive ensemble.

Name: Byron Lars In the Limelight Barbie Doll
Description: The first doll in Byron Lars' magnificent Runway Collection, In the Limelight™ Barbie® celebrates fresh, contemporary fashion. Barbie® is powerful, feminine, dynamic and glamorous. Her velvety gown of rich chocolate brown is boldly accented with a metallic cape lined in luscious lime. Strappy shoes and a dash of faux fur complete her dramatic look. Dynamic. Sophisticated. Completely unique.
